response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scene 1 (00:00 - 04:24): Observed Airani Iofifteen playing piano and singing. Top-left text "ヒドリ" identified as song title "Hitori". Search used: `"Hitori" Airani Iofifteen lyrics Japanese English`. Found lyrics. \n2. Scene 2 (04:25 - 05:00): Observed change of instrument to acoustic guitar. Text overlay at 04:25 showed "Lagu Tanpa Huruf R" and "Nadya Fatira". Search used: `"Lagu Tanpa Huruf R" Nadya Fatira lyrics Indonesian English`. Found lyrics.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performance by virtual YouTuber Airani Iofifteen in a space-themed setting. The first song is "Hitori" (Alone), which she sings and plays on a piano. The second song is "Lagu Tanpa Huruf R" by Nadya Fatira, which she performs with an acoustic guitar.

scenes.description: Airani Iofifteen starts her performance in a virtual, space-themed setting, playing the piano and singing "Hitori". The title "ヒドリ" appears on-screen in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hitoride iru kono kodoku ga
Itsukara egao o furimaku koto ni nareteita?
Itsukara honto no egao o ushinatteita?
Hitori janai kimi ga yume ni kawatte yuku
Mukai kaze mo habatakeru waratte ite okure
Hitotsu ni narou Futari koko made kita koto ga boku no yuuki no akashi dakara
Kawari tsudzuketeru kono sekai de
Kakujitsu na mono wa nani mo nai yo no naka dakedo
Kimi to warai kimi to naite boku wa boku ni modoru
Sunao ni narezu hagemashi sae kobande ita yoru mo
Konna boku o tsutsumu yô ni mimamotte ite kureta
Kimi no koto ga
Ikiru imi ni natteita
Mou subete wakatteru kara
Mou watashi ni chikayoranaideyo
Hateshinai kono
Kurushimi made mo aiseru
Hodo
Tsuyoi
Hito wa inaikara
Hitoride iru kono kodoku ga
Itsukara egao o furimaku koto ni nareteita?
Itsukara honto no egao o ushinatteita?
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I was by myself, I was trembling, feeling cold
From when did I get used to putting on a smile?
From when did I lose my true smile?
I am not alone, you are changing into a dream
Even against the headwind, I can fly, just keep smiling
Let's become one, the fact that we came this far together
Is proof of my courage, in this ever-changing world
There is nothing certain, but laughing with you, crying with you
I return to being myself
Even on nights when I couldn't be honest and refused encouragement
You were watching over me as if to wrap this me in your embrace
That is my reason for living
Since I've understood everything now
Don't get close to me anymore
I can love even the suffering of this endless child
Because there is no one as strong as you
When I was by myself, I was trembling, feeling cold
From when did I get used to putting on a smile?
From when did I lose my true smile?

scenes.description: Transition to the second song, "Lagu Tanpa Huruf R", with text overlay indicating title and credits. Airani Iofifteen now performs with an acoustic guitar.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ini kisahnya anak manusia
Kau bisa memanggilnya dengan nama Nadya
Sebuah konsonan yang menyulitkan
Membuat lidahnya bosan, tak bisa ucapkan
Dia coba pahami
Setiap manusia punya hebat punya cacat
Dia coba nikmati
Hidup ini cuma sekali
Dia Hanya punya modal cinta
Yang dia embuskan dalam setiap lagunya
Tak inginkan semua 'tuk suka
Dia Hanya ingin tuliskan lagu
Tentang semua yang ada dalam hatinya
Bila tak suka tentu saja tak mengapa
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
This is the story of a human child
You can call her by the name Nadya
A difficult consonant
Making her tongue bored, cannot pronounce it
She tries to understand
Every human has greatness, has flaws
She tries to enjoy
Life is only once
She only has the capital of love
Which she exhales in every song of hers
Doesn't want everyone to like it
She only wants to write a song
About everything that is in her heart
If you don't like it, of course it's okay
